# Web app

Web project tasks. Demonstrates IDs, depends-on, dataview format, nested tags.

## Emoji format

- [ ] Set up CI matrix for node 18/20 #task #project/web 🆔 web1 ⏫ 📅 2026-05-14
- [ ] Migrate to esbuild #task #project/web 🆔 web2 ⛔ web1 🔼 📅 2026-05-21
- [ ] Bundle size budgets in CI #task #project/web 🆔 web3 ⛔ web2 📅 2026-05-28
- [/] Convert error boundary to React 19 #task #project/web ⏫ ➕ 2026-05-05
- [ ] Add Sentry source maps to deploy #task #project/web 🔼 📅 2026-06-01
